DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
token
style
pattern

DSDS Pattern Definitions

Definitions for documenting broad interaction patterns — recurring solutions to common UX problems such as navigation, error messaging, form validation, empty states, loading sequences, and onboarding flows. Patterns describe how multiple components work together to solve a user need.

Source: patterns/pattern.schema.json

2 definitions in this file:

  • interaction
  • patternDoc

interaction

A single step or event in the pattern's interaction flow, describing what happens, what triggers it, and which components are involved.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
descriptionrichTextrequired
triggerstringoptionalWhat initiates this interaction step (e.g., 'User submits the form', 'API returns a 422 response', 'Page finishes loading').
componentsstring[]optionalThe components involved in this interaction step, by name.
examplesexample[]optionalExamples illustrating this interaction step.

References: richText, example

patternDoc

Documentation for a broad interaction pattern — a recurring, multi-component solution to a common UX problem. Patterns sit above individual components and describe how they are composed to address a user need.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredMachine-readable identifier (e.g., 'error-messaging', 'navigation', 'empty-state', 'loading-sequence').
Pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$
displayNamestringrequiredHuman-readable name (e.g., 'Error Messaging', 'Navigation', 'Empty State').
descriptionrichTextrequired
statusstatusrequired
categorystringrequiredThe pattern category (e.g., 'feedback', 'navigation', 'data-entry', 'disclosure', 'onboarding', 'layout').
summarystringoptionalA one-line, plain-text summary. MUST NOT contain markup.
deprecationNoticestringoptionalRequired when status is 'deprecated'.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this pattern was introduced.
tagsstring[]optionalFreeform tags for categorization and search.
componentsartifactReference[]optionalThe artifacts that participate in this pattern, with their roles. Typically references components by name from the component schema.
interactionsinteraction[]optionalThe interaction flow of the pattern — an ordered sequence of steps describing triggers, system responses, and component behavior.
useCasesuseCasesoptional
guidelinesguideline[]optionalUsage guidelines for the pattern. Each entry is a self-contained guideline. Use the `category` property on individual guidelines to group by concern (e.g., 'design', 'accessibility', 'content').
accessibilityaccessibilityObjectoptional
examplesexample[]optionalExamples illustrating the complete pattern in context.
linkslink[]optionalExternal resource links and related artifact references.
$extensionsextensionsoptional

Conditional: When status is "deprecated", then deprecationNotice is required.

References: richText, status, artifactReference, interaction, useCases, guideline, accessibilityObject, example, link, extensions
